title: Audience segment
description: A segment-first audience definition. This is not a persona, not a biography, and not a representative market sample.

fit_type.description: Role in the preflight. Use non_market_control for deliberately irrelevant or poor-fit perspectives.

context.description: Situation, workflow, budget, risk, or constraint defining the segment.

problem_or_job.description: The repeated problem, job, or moment that makes this segment relevant.

reachability.description: Where real people in this segment could be contacted or observed.

non_market_control.description: True when this segment is included to catch false support from irrelevant perspectives.

do_not_assume.description: Assumptions the run must not make about this segment, such as enthusiasm, willingness to pay, representativeness, or real-user evidence.
